feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Part of That World
entry.summary:
Author: BobaTheBlackHole

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,721Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 35

Summary: “She was my world, Bruce… and you took her away from me.” Bruce loved Clark before he knew what to call it. He stayed close enough to protect him.Far enough to understand he would never be chosen. And when Bruce finally confessed, Clark’s answer was disgust. But love does not disappear just because it is unwanted. Sometimes, it survives the wound.Sometimes, it survives the ruins.Sometimes, it survives time itself. Even for the person who never wanted it back.

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 119,669Chapters: 23/30Kudos: 711

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: SuperBat babysits the Incredibles, what could happen?
entry.summary:
Author: Grumpy_Goblinshark

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,881Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: In a world where being a superhero is illegal, all the superheroes need to ban together in small ways. Bob and Helen, more commonly known as Mr. Incredible and Elastigirl, need someone who can babysit their…unique children. Frozone is on vacation and Edna is who knows where, leaving the only capable person they know…Clark Kent, who used to be Superman. Clark doesn’t want to spend his weekend alone with kids, and since misery loves company…he drags Bruce Wayne along with him. His close friend, but…he feels more. Will a night with chaotic children help him get his man?

entry.title: one year older (than you'll ever be)
entry.summary:
Author: Areiton

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 851Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: And the thing is--he knows it's not an anniversary. He knows those like clockwork--Bruce's birthday and the kids, and the anniversary of all the major losses and deaths in their lives, in Bruce's life. He licks his lips, and Dick says, "It's Grandpa Wayne's birthday."

entry.title: Always and Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Iriley

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,611Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 436

Summary: Now that Peter’s portal home is finished it’s Jason’s turn to explore a whole new universe. A sequel to Shutterbug; Jason meets Peter’s old friends and villains along with some new ones! Enjoy! (Not entirely canon compliment! It’s a combination!)(I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THE CHARACTERS! They belong to marvel and DC!! Besides the one OC that belongs to a friend!)

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,890Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 858

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: HAIL MARY
entry.summary:
Author: sleepyteatimebear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,846Chapters: 17/32Kudos: 160

Summary: Clark 'Superman' Kent, is a shoe-in for the NFL draft, a tall, dimpled, All-American-Type, College Football's Jesus. Bruce is well-known for his intense dedication to collegiate journalism, his all-black closet and the billions promised to him upon graduation. Bruce wants to sweep at the Collegiate Emmy's, Clark wants to go pro. So, they make a deal. Bruce can produce a media campaign that rallies the public behind Clark before Draft Day. Bruce helps to upkeep the Wayne Media Enterprise legacy, and Clark gets good press. But then, Clark and Bruce spend game-day after game-day together. Bruce asks Clark questions, studies him, captures him, writes all of him down. What's even more peculiar is Clark starts asking questions back. Questions that make Bruce feel like Clark wants to know him as more than just his shadow for the season. They can’t fall in love. It wouldn’t make practical sense. It wouldn’t make emotional sense. But couldn't it?

entry.title: Cabin of Shadows
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,677Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 6

Summary: Seven friends. One lake house. A gas station attendant named Mike who looks them all in the eye at the counter and says, without performance or preamble: “You’re going to die up there.” He’s not wrong. Bruce Wayne is not the protagonist of a horror movie. He is the control freak—the one who plans, who catalogues, who watches everyone’s micro-expressions and files them for later. He is also the one who held the soda can at the gas station, felt what it was, and put it down. That single gesture threads through everything that follows. Clark Kent is immune to the fear component of the compound. He is not immune to the other component. This becomes relevant. Repeatedly. A Justice League horror AU in which everyone uses their civilian names, the horror is real, the deaths are earned, and the thing that survives is not what you expect.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Heaven's a heartbreak away, it's been a hell of a ride (I won't give you up)
entry.summary:
Author: choedclare

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,978Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: Bruce has come across what might be the strangest thing: Superman is crying—well, a smaller version of him is crying, and he is at a loss on how… to proceed when faced with such a bizarre event. Superman doesn’t cry. And, Superman definitely does not look so small, and defeated. Or which, Bruce meets Superman a total number of four times throughout a single timeline, and it is not an encounter he can simply bury and toss. It is a revelation.

entry.title: watching life from the passenger's side
entry.summary:
Author: 404_Sky

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,180Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 115

Summary: It sits in his chest growing roots in to muscle and bone and sinew behind his ribs and up his throat. It's lead in his bones and pinpricks on his skin and air trapped in his lungs; oppressive and burdensome and ever present, always present, always always always. Some days he Doesn't Want To Be Here and by some days he means most days but what other choice does he have? It's not like he can just stop. -- Clark Kent is not okay.

entry.title: Superbat (title pending)
entry.summary:
Author: Xx_princess_xX

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,211Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Bruce Wayne—Gotham's airheaded, billionaire playboy.Batman—Gotham's heroic, brooding genius.No matter the part he played, he was unfazed. Untouchable. Unstoppable.But he was only human, after all.For years, he's pined for two men: Clark Kent and Superman.For years, he's believed they were two separate issues.Until one fateful Justice League meeting, Nightwing discovers his father's workplace crush and Justice League co-worker are the same person.Unfortunately for The Dark Knight, Dick Grayson and Jason Todd are the ones delivering the news.At least, now he had one (extremely embarrassing) problem instead of two... right? aka Nightwing tugged at his suit, attempting to smooth down the awkward creases and folds on the spandex. He had thrown it on in haste because, unbeknownst to Dick, he had a Justice League meeting to attend.“Go.”said Bruce, deadpan.“Why me?”argued Dick, standing there in the middle of the Bat Cave, clutching Zitka to his chest. He was about to have the most epic movie marathon of his life, when a bandaged, tired Dad had called him down.

entry.title: Shadow and Sun
entry.summary:
Author: Katylark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 160,940Chapters: 16/25Kudos: 28

Summary: When Darkseid’s invasion forces Earth’s heroes to unite, an unknown alien changes the course of the battle—and the world names him Superman. Eighteen months later, Superman is beloved across the globe, distrusted by Batman, and lonelier than anyone knows. Clark Kent has lost both of his parents, built a Fortress in the Arctic, and is quietly coming undone under the weight of grief, secrecy, and the strange Kryptonian bonds that once made his family feel like home. Then he meets Bruce Wayne. What begins across the waters between Metropolis and Gotham as an unexpected romance becomes something deeper, more dangerous, and far more fragile than either of them is prepared for—especially when Clark’s last surviving family falls from the stars, Lex Luthor starts asking all the right questions, and Bruce mistakes the truth for betrayal. A story about first trust, second chances, alien invasions, black sites, the family you lose, and the family you choose.
